name: VPWEM: Non-Markovian Visuomotor Policy with Working and Episodic Memory

description: arXiv:2603.04910v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Imitation learning from human demonstrations has achieved significant success in robotic control, yet most visuomotor policies still condition on single-step observations or short-context histories, making them struggle with non-Markovian tasks that require long-term memory. author: Yuheng Lei, Zhixuan Liang, Hongyuan Zhang, Ping Luo
